display.purpose: Hero headlines and decisive destination moments.

body.purpose: Clear planning copy, form help, and itinerary explanation.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Separate cards only when tone and spacing are not enough.

shadows.name: premium-panel-lift
shadows.purpose: Booking form panel and decisive conversion surfaces.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Entrances and state changes on opacity and transform.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Reserve Forest pill CTA for booking and high-intent actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.387 0.088 150.434); color: oklch(0.985 0.003 106.448); padding: 16px 40px; border: 0; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Satoshi, Source Sans 3, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: background-color 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.327 0.075 151.394); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(31, 77, 43, 0.18); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.761 0.126 82.231 / 0.35); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Safari Input
components.description: Soft pill input for booking forms.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; color: oklch(0.231 0.024 139.956); font-family: Satoshi, Source Sans 3, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-input { height: 36px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.959 0.007 151.888 / 0.5); color: oklch(0.231 0.024 139.956); padding: 4px 12px; font: inherit; font-weight: 400; outline: none; transition: border-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.761 0.126 82.231); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.761 0.126 82.231 / 0.3); }

components.name: Destination Card
components.description: Large-radius image card for parks, lodges, and itinerary modules.
components.html:
National Park

Ranthambore

Field-led safari planning with lodge, permit, and drive guidance.
components.css: .ds-card { overflow: hidden; border-radius: 40px; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.231 0.024 139.956); box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(31, 77, 43, 0.08); font-family: Satoshi, Source Sans 3, sans-serif; } .ds-card-media { height: 220px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.387 0.088 150.434), oklch(0.807 0.108 85.99)); } .ds-card-body { padding: 24px; } .ds-card-label { margin: 0 0 8px; color: oklch(0.548 0.073 72.649); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0 0 10px; color: oklch(0.387 0.088 150.434); font-family: Gambetta, Georgia, serif; font-size: 28px; line-height: 1.15; } .ds-card p:last-child { margin: 0; color: oklch(0.486 0.027 258.371); line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Transparent Hero Nav
components.description: Fixed navigation over imagery, shifting to readable warm surface after scroll.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 28px; min-height: 80px; padding: 0 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); background: oklch(0.387 0.088 150.434); color: oklch(0.985 0.003 106.448); font-family: Satoshi, Source Sans 3, sans-serif; } .ds-nav strong { margin-right: auto; font-family: Gambetta, Georgia, serif; font-size: 24px; } .ds-nav a { color: inherit; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav a:hover { color: oklch(0.807 0.108 85.99); } .ds-nav button { border: 0; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.807 0.108 85.99); color: oklch(0.231 0.024 139.956); padding: 12px 20px; font-weight: 800; }

narrative.overview: WildEarth should feel like the planning desk inside a remote safari lodge: field notes, permit confidence, warm hospitality, and a calm operator who knows the terrain. The system is brand-first, but every flourish must earn trust or aid discovery. The visual language uses restrained natural materials: reserve green, ranger ochre, parchment sand, and grounded typography.
keyCharacteristics: Soft utility components with clear focus states.
Quiet discovery paths that lead naturally to inquiry.

rules.name: The Ochre Rarity Rule
rules.body: Ranger Ochre is a signal, not a wash. Use it for labels, icons, and focus cues, not for large decorative blocks.

rules.name: The No Pure Neutral Rule
rules.body: Avoid pure black and pure white in new UI. Neutrals must stay slightly warm or green-tinted.

rules.name: The Field Note Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Use serif type for voice and place, sans type for action and clarity. Do not blur those roles.

rules.name: The Flat First Rule
rules.body: If a surface can be separated by spacing, background tone, or image composition, do that before adding shadow.

dos: Do use real wildlife, lodge, terrain, or park imagery when a surface is destination-led.
Do lead with specific operational proof: direct teams, permits, response expectations, and park knowledge.
Do use Reserve Forest for decisive actions and Ranger Ochre for rare signals.
Do respect WCAG AA contrast, visible focus, reduced motion, and multilingual-ready copy structure.
Do keep motion on opacity and transform with cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1).
donts: Don't create generic travel agency design: deal-heavy packages, vague superlatives, stock vacation polish, or quote-trap forms.
Don't create overdone luxury resort design: gold excess, perfume-ad drama, or visuals detached from terrain and wildlife.
Don't use adventure-bro positioning: conquest language, extreme-sports urgency, or loud adrenaline-first visuals.
Don't use NGO campaign tone: guilt-forward conservation messaging that overwhelms the travel job.
Don't use colored side-stripe borders, gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, nested card stacks, or identical icon-card grids.
